name: GitHub Ready Issue -> Runner Agent Dispatch

parameters.command:
=set -euo pipefail
RUN_INPUT_PATH="{{$json.run_input_remote}}"
RUN_INPUT_DIR="$(dirname "$RUN_INPUT_PATH")"
mkdir -p "$RUN_INPUT_DIR"
printf '%s' "{{$json.run_input_b64}}" | base64 -d > "$RUN_INPUT_PATH"
chmod 640 "$RUN_INPUT_PATH"
test -s "$RUN_INPUT_PATH"
jq . "$RUN_INPUT_PATH" >/dev/null
BYTES="$(wc -c < "$RUN_INPUT_PATH" | tr -d ' ')"
echo "{\"ok\":true,\"phase\":\"ssh_write_run_input\",\"run_input_path\":\"$RUN_INPUT_PATH\",\"bytes\":$BYTES}"

=set -euo pipefail

STATUS_PATH="{{$('Prepare RUN_INPUT.json').first().json.evidence_dir}}/status.json"

for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if [ -s "$STATUS_PATH" ]; then
    jq . "$STATUS_PATH"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 2
done

echo "{\"ok\":false,\"error\":\"status.json not found after timeout\",\"status_path\":\"$STATUS_PATH\"}"
exit 1

=set -euo pipefail
RUN_INPUT_PATH="{{$json.run_input_remote}}"
RUN_INPUT_DIR="$(dirname "$RUN_INPUT_PATH")"
mkdir -p "$RUN_INPUT_DIR"
printf '%s' "{{$json.run_input_b64}}" | base64 -d > "$RUN_INPUT_PATH"

exit 1
